scroll_found.title: Research the Veiled Spirits scroll at a Research Pedestal

brew_spirits.title: Brew a bottle of spirits using Brewin & Chewin's temperature-based system

subtitle.text: Brewin & Chewin adds a temperature system. The ferment knows the difference.

description: CH.04 · THE VEILED SPIRITS
▸ Brewin & Chewin is the distillery expansion.
It adds spirits, ales, and the temperature system:
the ambient temperature affects fermentation quality.
◈ TEMPERATURE FERMENTATION SYSTEM
└ Each brew has an ideal temperature range
└ Too cold: fermentation stalls, poor quality
└ Too hot: fermentation rushes, burns off flavor
└ Exact temp: maximum quality, maximum effects
└ Cold Sweat temperature = brewing temperature
(the same system that tracks body warmth
also tracks your fermentation room)
◈ BREWIN & CHEWIN OUTPUTS
└ Sweet Berry Jam — confirmed, not a drink
(used in baking recipes, not brewing)
└ Ales: grain-fermented, mild effects
└ Spirits: distilled, strong effects, small quantity
└ Cider: fruit-based, quick ferment
└ Mead variant: honey spirits, higher potency
◈ SCROLL: The Veiled Spirits
└ Found in: tavern cellar chests, distillery ruins,
smuggler caches, hidden cellar stashes
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full Brewin & Chewin system,
temperature fermentation awareness
▸ The scroll smells like the contents.
Someone kept it in the same crate as the bottles.
For a long time.
▶ Find The Veiled Spirits scroll [check]
▶ Brew a spirits bottle using Brewin & Chewin [check]
◇ Brewin & Chewin + Cold Sweat integration:
build your distillery in a biome with
temperature near the target brew range.
